nodes.label: Drivers of Weak Consumption
nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-06-17 105215_冰冰小美_这种消费增速，是什么原因导致的？科技与狠活食品添加剂问题，预制菜，动不动就曝光的食品安全问题，比如泡面梅菜，比如水果侵染.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Food-safety concerns, debt effects on income and employment, property-bubble aftermath, demographic decline, ageing, higher saving, and the end of subsidies are presented as causes of consumption weakness.
